## Enterprise Readiness Checklist

- [ ] Independent AppSec or platform security review requested.
- [ ] SAST results reviewed and all critical/high findings fixed or risk accepted.
- [ ] SCA results reviewed and all critical findings fixed.
- [ ] New or changed outbound network paths documented and covered by allowlist controls.
- [ ] Release artifacts will be built with signed provenance before promotion.
- [ ] No telemetry, usage tracking, public LLM endpoint, or remote visualization asset was added.

## Notes

Describe any security-relevant behavior changes, dependencies, or rollout requirements.
